nasb.text: Break the arm of the wicked and the evildoer, Seek out his wickedness until You find none.

esv.text: Break the arm of the wicked and evildoer; call his wickedness to account till you find none.

cnv.text: 願你打斷惡人和壞人的膀臂， 願你追究他們的惡行，直到清清楚楚。

ccb.text: 求你打断恶人的臂膀， 彻底追究他们的罪恶。

csbs.text: 求你打断恶人的膀臂； 至于坏人，求你追讨他的邪恶，直到净尽！
